allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install --quiet numpy scikit-learn pyyaml pytest)
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m wrapper.run --in data/synthetic_dev.csv --out out_spine_test.csv --mode spine --config configs/test.yaml --debug-seed DEV)
Bash(time PYTHONUTF8=1 .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m wrapper.run --in mini.csv --out mini_hf.csv --mode spine --config configs/test.yaml --mlm-backend hf --debug-seed DEV)
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m wrapper.run --in mini.csv --out mini_hf.csv --mode spine --config configs/test.yaml --mlm-backend hf --debug-seed DEV)
Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 .venv/Scripts/python.exe -m harness.evaluate --original data/synthetic_dev.csv --privatized out_spine_test.csv --config configs/test.yaml --utility-backend hf)

Bash(rm -f out_identity.csv out_dpmlm.csv out_spine.csv out_spine_test.csv mini.csv mini_hf.csv *.log.jsonl out_*.csv.log.jsonl mini*.log.jsonl verify_out_log.txt 2>/dev/null; rm -rf verify_out 2>/dev/null; printf '\\n# scratch / verify artifacts\\nverify_out/\\nmini*.csv\\nout_*.csv\\n*.report.json\\n' >> .gitignore && echo "cleaned. remaining top-level:" && ls -1)
